title: trace_event.v1
description: One ordered material event emitted by a target or the harness during a case execution. Payloads are redacted or stored by reference; the trace itself is append-only evidence.

event_type.description: Typed event, e.g. invocation_started, response_received, invocation_error, parse_started, parse_completed, scoring_started, scoring_completed. Agent workloads (M8) add skill_selected, policy_checked, etc.

actor.description: Component or system that emitted the event, e.g. 'harness.orchestrator' or 'target.recorded_pass.v1'.

payload_ref.description: Reference to a stored artifact holding the (possibly large or redacted) payload.
